---
title: "Einar Paz"
subtitle: "PhD Student in Economics"
---

Welcome!

I am a Ph.D. student in the Department of Economics at The University of Texas at Austin.

My research interests are in macroeconomics, behavioral macroeconomics, monetary economics, and labor economics.

## Contact

Department of Economics  
The University of Texas at Austin  

Email: [einarpaz@utexas.edu](mailto:einarpaz@utexas.edu)
